🦿 ArthroplastyREF: MRL-PAT-001

Freedom Knee Patella Components

Freedom Knee · Knee Patellar Components

Patellar components designed for optimal tracking and articulation with Freedom femoral components. Provides smooth patellar motion and reduced anterior knee pain.

MaterialUltra High Molecular Weight Polyethylene (UHMWPE)
Frequently Asked Questions

Patellar components designed for optimal tracking and articulation with Freedom femoral components. Provides smooth patellar motion and reduced anterior knee pain.

This product is manufactured by Meril Life Sciences and is distributed by Agile Healthcare across all districts of Telangana.

Yes, all Meril Life Sciences products distributed by Agile Healthcare, including the Freedom Knee Patella Components, strictly adhere to CDSCO guidelines and ISO 13485:2016 quality standards.

The Freedom Knee Patella Components is constructed using Ultra High Molecular Weight Polyethylene (UHMWPE), ensuring high biocompatibility and durability.
